programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Missoula County, animal control steps in to help two bucks whose antlers have become tangled; in Lafayette, a car full of partygoers turns a traffic stop into an impromptu disco. In Lawrence, K9 Axel demonstrates his skills in the field.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Police respond to a car accident in Nye County; in Richland County, a routine traffic stop reveals suspected drugs; in Warwick, a house fire prompts a rescue of trapped animals.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Warwick, officers respond to a colleague's home after a wild bird gets loose inside; in Greene County, a driver flees a traffic stop; in Pasco, a K9 team searches for a suspect.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A K9 in Greene County tracks down a suspected stolen car driver; in Warwick, a bar patron insists he wasn't driving; in Mission, officers question a confused burglary suspect.

programme.desc: Officers in Franklin assist in a pursuit of a suspected robbery suspect; in Warwick, a driver suspected of DUI takes a sobriety test but faces an unexpected wardrobe issue; in Pasco, surveillance and a warrant lead to an arrest.
